title: Qlog Internal Capture And Dispatch Work Item
summary: Implement an internal qlog capture coordinator with session-scoped and process-wide registration, frozen event snapshots, and a non-blocking off-thread dispatch boundary.
planned_changes: Add internal capture registration and dispatch types to `Incursa.Qlog`, freeze mutable `QlogEvent` state before asynchronous handoff, default each observer to a bounded drop-on-full queue sized from available memory, preserve an internal unbounded override for callers that explicitly accept the memory trade-off, and keep file or streaming publication in separate sink adapters without reshaping the core coordinator.
out_of_scope: Built-in file or streaming sink implementations.
verification_plan: Run SpecTrace validation plus targeted unit tests for session and process-wide registration, freeze semantics, current per-session ordering behavior, default bounded queue sizing, bounded drop-on-full behavior, the explicit unbounded override, and non-blocking dispatch behavior.
